violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout the back storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The following non food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: 1.beverage cooler shelves observed with dust and/or biofilm. 2.retail food shelves observed with dust and soil debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The floors in the back storage area is in poor repair(missing tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items, trash, and foliage were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The floors under retail shelves, behind beverage coolers, and throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, dust, and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
